name: Tank Carrier
notes: Kraken Point Shipyard exclusive. The planned 'Heavy Transport' from the roster doc, renamed Tank Carrier — bigger than HMS Cuddles and the first transport whose cargoAllowedTags includes Land, not just Infantry: it can carry vehicle squads (2 squads total, any mix of Land/Infantry, each squad occupying one slot regardless of its own headcount). Fully unarmed like Transport Truck, and like Transport Truck (not HMS Cuddles) it can launch cargo mid-combat rather than only while idle/docked — an amphibious-assault craft that drops tanks straight into a fight.
